name: Carol Berg
bio: Carol Berg is the author of fantasy novels, including the books from the Rai-Kirah series, Song of the Beast, the books from The Bridge of D'Arnath series, the Lighthouse novels, and Collegia Magica. She also writes the Chimera series under the pen name Cate Glass.

awards.name: Mythopoeic Fantasy Award for Adult Literature
Mythopoeic Fantasy Award for Adult Literature
